name: A Barrel of Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix baking soda and water. Set aside to cool.
2. Cream the oil and sugar. Add egg whites and mix well.
3. Combine bran cereals and flours. Add to creamed mixture and stir in buttermilk.
4. Add water and baking soda, then mix.
5. Store the batter in a covered container in the refrigerator. When ready to bake, preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Spoon batter into lightly oiled or paper lined muffin tins. Return extra batter to the refrigerator.
7. Bake muffins for 20-25 minutes. Makes 60 muffins.
